niral_intro: NIRAL (National Innovative Research and Academic League) is the annual national-level technical symposium organized by the Department of Information Science and Technology (IST), College of Engineering Guindy (CEG), Anna University, Chennai.
niral_history: NIRAL started as an MCA student-run symposium and has evolved into a recognized inter-collegiate and national-level event. It has grown from a small college event to attracting participants from across Tamil Nadu and other states. Over the years, NIRAL has incorporated AI hackathons, large-scale coding marathons, and various technical and non-technical competitions.
ist_department: The Department of Information Science and Technology (IST) at CEG, Anna University is known for academic excellence and organizing NIRAL symposium annually.
event_types: NIRAL includes technical events like coding contests, SQL competitions, debugging challenges, UI/UX development, and non-technical events like treasure hunts, quizzes, and creative competitions.
registration_process: Participants must register for events through the NIRAL website. Some events are free while others have registration fees ranging from ₹50 to ₹200.
prizes: NIRAL events offer prize pools ranging from ₹5,000 to ₹30,000 for winners.
contact: For queries, contact the NIRAL coordinators through the official website or email.
venue: NIRAL 2026 is held at College of Engineering Guindy, Anna University, Chennai.
participation: Students from colleges across India can participate in NIRAL events. Participants must bring valid college ID.
event_rules: General rules: Participants must bring college ID, judges' decisions are final, misconduct leads to disqualification, organizers reserve the right to modify rules.
sql_war_rules: SQL War rules: Individual participation, query efficiency and correctness are judging criteria, no unfair means allowed, judges' decisions are final.
team_events: Some events allow team participation (2-3 members), while others are individual competitions. Check specific event details.
workshops: NIRAL includes technical workshops and guest lectures by industry experts on emerging technologies.
certificates: All participants receive participation certificates. Winners receive winner certificates and prizes.
accommodation: Information about accommodation for outstation participants can be obtained from NIRAL coordinators.
